rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF TRENET CASTLE
rulings.Calendar Matter: PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION, APPOINTMENT UNDER IAEA
rulings.Rulings: hearing. appearance required. it appears this petition may not go forward as there has to be a vacancy in the office of personal representative (see issue, re citation for other petition). in addition, notes re issues with this petition were emailed to counsel on Wednesday, 11/21 at 10:57 a.m.

rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF TRENET CASTLE
rulings.Calendar Matter: Petition For Removal And Surcharge Of Administrator And For Accounting
rulings.Rulings: hearing. appearance required. it is not clear this petition can go forward, as the citation was left with the spouse, who returned the paperwork to the court stating Dino Castle had not lived with her since March. That statement appears consistent with statements made by petitioner in her petition for special letters.
